meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Checklist
content.seo_description: Overcome basic app limitations with the Antigravity project template. A high-impact, intermediate-level guide for freelancers using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop manually configuring boilerplate. Use the Antigravity project template to instantly spin up production-ready, modular architectures. By integrating Claude Code, you automate the heavy lifting of boilerplate, allowing you to focus on high-value business logic and ship sophisticated, enterprise-grade applications in a fraction of the traditional time.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: staring at a blank terminal, agonizing over folder structures, and manually wiring up auth, database schemas, and API routes. It’s the ‘basic app’ trap—the silent killer of freelancer profit margins. You’re spending hours on plumbing when you should be delivering value to clients who are waiting for results.

But the era of manual scaffolding is over. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural force multiplier, turning complex, multi-day setups into a singular, high-velocity execution. Combined with the raw power of Claude Code, you’re not just writing code; you’re orchestrating entire feature sets with surgical precision and professional speed.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational project structure that enforces clean architecture from commit zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template for a production-ready SaaS, including TypeScript, Zod validation, and Drizzle ORM.

steps.title: Automate Domain Modeling
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map out your client's business requirements into strongly-typed data schemas.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the database schema and API endpoints for a multi-tenant user management system using the Antigravity pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate domain models for tenant and user entities'

steps.title: Configure Middleware & Security
steps.description: Inject professional-grade auth and rate-limiting middleware without writing boilerplate from scratch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure secure middleware for the Antigravity template, ensuring all routes are protected by role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply RBAC middleware to all api routes'

steps.title: Implement Feature Modules
steps.description: Add specific business features while maintaining the strict separation of concerns mandated by the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new feature module for subscription billing using the Antigravity service-layer pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold billing module using service-layer pattern'

steps.title: Run Production Validation
steps.description: Perform an automated audit of your code against the template's strict quality standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run an audit on the current project to ensure compliance with the Antigravity performance and security standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit project against production standards'

pro_tips: Always customize your Antigravity template config with your preferred linting rules before running the first Claude Code command.
Use Claude Code's 'commit' feature to generate semantic, conventional commits directly from the CLI to keep your history clean.
Keep your service layer thin; if a function exceeds 50 lines, ask Claude Code to refactor it into smaller, composable helpers.
Leverage the Antigravity 'mock' factory to generate test data for clients before the database is even fully deployed.
Create a custom 'prompt library' for your repeat client tasks to ensure consistency across all your freelance projects.
content.next_steps: Deploy your first MVP to a staging environment using the Antigravity CLI, then share the preview link with your client for rapid feedback cycles.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact blueprint to stop building 'basic' apps and start shipping high-value software that commands premium rates. Stop wasting time on repetitive tasks and start focusing on the architecture that actually drives revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
